arts.ttl: “Deserves credit” | West Ham’s silent hero responsible for big spending
arts.sum: West Ham have one man to thank for their big spending over recent years. When moving to the London Stadium, fans were promised world-class football in a world-class stadium. While it may have taken a while, the level West Ham are competing at certainly is much higher than it has been at any other point... arts.ttl: Liverpool perform transfer U-turn as Arne Slot 'green lights' contract talks
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot reportedly gives the green light for talks to begin over a new contract for winger Luis Diaz, who has enjoyed a fabulous start to 2024-25.

arts.ttl: One of West Ham’s most expensive summer signings wasn’t approved by Tim Steidten
arts.sum: Tim Steidten picked all of West Ham United’s summer signings apart from Crysencio Summerville, according to reports. The Hammers embarked on a lavish spending spree to back new manager Julen Lopetegui, bringing in the likes of Niclas Fullkrug, Max Kilman, Guido Rodriguez and Aaron Wan-Bissaka.
